flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Feather River Community College District fell 56% between 2022 and 2024 (37.5% → 16.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Feather River Community College District rose 40% between 2007 and 2010 ($614 → $859).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Feather River Community College District rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Feather River Community College District fell 12% between 2007 and 2010 (58.1% → 50.9%).
